name: online-inventory-control-system
description: cd backend npm install npm run dev

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd ai_service && .\.venv\Scripts\uvicorn main:app --reload --port 18000"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
